title: Demographics of Mayotte
content:
This article is about the demographic features of the population of Mayotte, including population density, ethnicity, education level, health of the populace, economic status, religious affiliations and other aspects of the population. Mayotte's population density went from 179 persons per square kilometer in 1985 to 251 per square kilometer in 1991. Its capital, Dzaoudzi, had a population of 5,865 according to the 1985 census; the island's largest town, Mamoudzou, had 12,026 people. CIA World Factbook demographic statistics. The following demographic statistics are from the CIA World Factbook, unless otherwise indicated. Population: 178,437 (July 2003 est.)

Age structure: <br "0-14 years:" 46.5% (male 41,632; female 41,301) <br "15-64 years:" 51.8% (male 50,373; female 42,118) <br "65 years and over:" 1.7% (male 1,502; female 1,511) (2003 est.) Median age: <br "total:" 16.9 years <br "male:" 18.1 years <br "female:" 15.7 years (2002) Population growth rate: 3.47% (2008 est.) Birth rate: 42.86 births/1,000 population (2003 est.)

Death rate: 8.34 deaths/1,000 population (2003 est.) Net migration rate: 7.94 migrant(s)/1,000 population (2003 est.) Sex ratio: <br "at birth:" 1.03 male(s)/female <br "under 15 years:" 1.01 male(s)/female <br "15-64 years:" 1.2 male(s)/female <br "65 years and over:" 0.99 male(s)/female <br "total population:" 1.1 male(s)/female (2003 est.)

Infant mortality rate: <br "total:" 65.98 deaths/1,000 live births (2003 est.) <br "female:" 59.44 deaths/1,000 live births <br "male:" 72.32 deaths/1,000 live births Life expectancy at birth: <br "total population:" 60.6 years <br "male:" 58.49 years <br "female:" 62.78 years (2003 est.) HIV/AIDS - adult prevalence rate: NA% HIV/AIDS - people living with HIV/AIDS: NA HIV/AIDS - deaths: NA Total fertility rate: 4.5 children born/woman (2008 est.)
